name: Kayle Sun-Eater
description: The hated sun-eater, Kayle wished to be one with the divine she loved, devouring the primordial sun and steeping the land in an eternal eclipse. Driven mad with light and unable to contain her power, she passed fragments down to an army of witch-knights who slew the other gods in an act of unforgiveable blasphemy
creator: Mihari chan
